```{r}
  cohens_summary[i,c("CA_VEP")] <- cohen_kappa(ca_t,vep_t,i,site_threshold)
  
  #UPDA vs. VEP
  cohens_summary[i,c("UPDA_VEP")] <- cohen_kappa(upda_t,vep_t,i,site_threshold)
}

write.csv(cohens_summary, "./OUTPUT/cohens_kappa.csv",row.names=F)
```

```{r}
chisq_p1 <- read.csv("./OUTPUT/chi_squared_p-values.csv")

cohens_summary <- read.csv("./OUTPUT/cohens_kappa.csv")%>%
  mutate(Year=750:1280)

cohens_summary1<-cohens_summary%>%
  mutate(pecosclass_average_cohen = (pecosclass_CA+pecosclass_UPDA+pecosclass_VEP)/3,
         CA_average_cohen = (pecosclass_CA+CA_UPDA+CA_VEP)/3,
         UPDA_average_cohen = (pecosclass_UPDA+CA_UPDA+UPDA_VEP)/3,
         VEP_average_cohen = (pecosclass_VEP+CA_VEP+UPDA_VEP)/3,
         Year=750:1280)

cohens_pecosclass1 <- cohens_summary1%>%
  select(c("Year","pecosclass_average_cohen","pecosclass_CA","pecosclass_UPDA","pecosclass_VEP"))%>%
  gather(Method,cohen,-Year)

cohens_ca1 <- cohens_summary1%>%
  select(c("Year","CA_average_cohen","pecosclass_CA","CA_UPDA","CA_VEP"))%>%
  gather(Method,cohen,-Year)

cohens_upda1 <- cohens_summary1%>%
  select(c("Year","UPDA_average_cohen","pecosclass_UPDA","CA_UPDA","UPDA_VEP"))%>%
  gather(Method,cohen,-Year)

cohens_vep1 <- cohens_summary1%>%
  select(c("Year","VEP_average_cohen","pecosclass_VEP","CA_VEP","UPDA_VEP"))%>%
  gather(Method,cohen,-Year)



### REFACTOR FOR CLEAN PLOTTING
cohens_pecosclass1$Method <- factor(cohens_pecosclass1$Method,levels=c("pecosclass_CA","pecosclass_UPDA","pecosclass_VEP","pecosclass_average_cohen"))

cohens_ca1$Method <- factor(cohens_ca1$Method,levels=c("pecosclass_CA","CA_UPDA","CA_VEP","CA_average_cohen"))

cohens_upda1$Method <- factor(cohens_upda1$Method,levels=c("pecosclass_UPDA","CA_UPDA","UPDA_VEP","UPDA_average_cohen"))

cohens_vep1$Method <- factor(cohens_vep1$Method,levels=c("pecosclass_VEP","CA_VEP","UPDA_VEP","VEP_average_cohen"))
###



p1<-ggplot(data=chisq_p1,aes(V1,V2))+
  geom_line(col="grey30",lwd=1.5)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(700,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,0.15),breaks=seq(0,0.15,by=0.05))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y="Chi-Square P-value",
       title="Average Agreement (Cohen's Kappa) by Method")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(#legend.position="none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.title=element_text(size=15),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2))

p2<-ggplot(data=cohens_pecosclass1 ,aes(Year,cohen))+
  annotate("rect",xmin=900,xmax=999,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1050,xmax=1149,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  geom_line(aes(col=Method),lwd=1.5)+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#6C6C8140","#6C6C8140","#6C6C8140","#3d405b"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(700,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.25))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y="Cohen's Kappa\n(Pecos Class)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2))

p3<-ggplot(data=cohens_ca1 ,aes(Year,cohen))+
  annotate("rect",xmin=700,xmax=799,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=880,xmax=919,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=980,xmax=1019,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1060,xmax=1099,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1180,xmax=1249,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  geom_line(aes(col=Method),lwd=1.5)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(700,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.25))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#E07A5F40","#E07A5F40","#E07A5F40","#E07A5F"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(700,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y="Cohen's Kappa\n(CA)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2))

p4<-ggplot(data=cohens_upda1 ,aes(Year,cohen))+
  annotate("rect",xmin=800,xmax=874,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=925,xmax=974,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1050,xmax=1174,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1201,xmax=1250,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  geom_line(aes(col=Method),lwd=1.5)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(700,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.25))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#BCD1C580","#BCD1C580","#BCD1C580","#81B29A"))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y="Cohen's Kappa\n(UPDA)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2))

p5<-ggplot(data=cohens_vep1 ,aes(Year,cohen))+
  annotate("rect",xmin=700,xmax=724,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=800,xmax=839,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=880,xmax=919,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=980,xmax=1019,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1060,xmax=1099,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1140,xmax=1179,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1225,xmax=1259,ymin=0,ymax=1,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  geom_line(aes(col=Method),lwd=1.5)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(700,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.25))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#BFA37366","#BFA37366","#BFA37366","#BFA373"))+
  labs(x="Year",
       y="Cohen's Kappa\n(VEP)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2))


png('./FIGURES/Figure_5_CohensKappa.png',height=16000,width=12000,res=1200)
ggarrange(p1,p2,p3,p4,p5, nrow=5,ncol=1,align="hv",heights=c(0.75,1,1,1,1))
dev.off()
```

```{r}
cohens_summary <- read.csv("./OUTPUT/cohens_kappa.csv")%>%
  mutate(Year=750:1280)%>%
  gather(method,disagree,-Year)

pecosclass_ca <-filter(cohens_summary,method=="pecosclass_CA")
pecosclass_upda <-filter(cohens_summary,method=="pecosclass_UPDA")
pecosclass_vep <-filter(cohens_summary,method=="pecosclass_VEP")
ca_upda <-filter(cohens_summary,method=="CA_UPDA")
ca_vep <-filter(cohens_summary,method=="CA_VEP")
upda_vep <-filter(cohens_summary,method=="UPDA_VEP")


kk_av <- mean(cohens_summary$disagree)

p1<-ggplot()+
  geom_rect(data=pecosclass_ranges_plot1,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1.16,ymax=1.3),col="#3D405B",fill="#9898A2",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_rect(data=ca_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1,ymax=1.14),col="#E07A5F",fill="#E9B5A4",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=kk_av,linetype="dotted",linewidth=0.85,col="grey30")+
  geom_line(data=pecosclass_ca,aes(Year,disagree),col="#8F5D5D",lwd=1.25)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1.35),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.5))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y="Cohen's Kappa (anything above dotted line\nis better than average)",
       title ="Pecos Classs & CA")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        plot.title=element_text(size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=13),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(10,10,10,5))

p2<-ggplot()+
  geom_rect(data=pecosclass_ranges_plot1,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1.16,ymax=1.3),col="#3D405B",fill="#9898A2",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_rect(data=upda_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1,ymax=1.14),col="#81b29a",fill="#BAD1C2",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=kk_av,linetype="dotted",linewidth=0.85,col="grey30")+
  geom_line(data=pecosclass_upda,aes(Year,disagree),col="#5F797B",lwd=1.25)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1.35),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.5))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y=NULL,
       title ="Pecos Class & UPDA")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        plot.title=element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(10,10,10,5))

p3<-ggplot()+
  geom_rect(data=pecosclass_ranges_plot1,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1.16,ymax=1.3),col="#3D405B",fill="#9898A2",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_rect(data=vep_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1,ymax=1.14),col="#BFA373",fill="#F2CC8FA4",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=kk_av,linetype="dotted",linewidth=0.85,col="grey30")+
  geom_line(data=pecosclass_vep,aes(Year,disagree),col="#7E7267",lwd=1.25)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1.35),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.5))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y=NULL,
       title ="Pecos Class & VEP")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        plot.title=element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(10,10,10,5))

p4<-ggplot()+
  geom_rect(data=ca_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1.16,ymax=1.3),col="#E07A5F",fill="#E9B5A4",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
    geom_rect(data=upda_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1,ymax=1.14),col="#81b29a",fill="#BAD1C2",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=kk_av,linetype="dotted",linewidth=0.85,col="grey30")+
  geom_line(data=ca_upda,aes(Year,disagree),col="#B1967D",lwd=1.25)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1.35),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.5))+
  labs(x="Year",
       y="Cohen's Kappa (anything above dotted line\nis better than average)",
       title ="CA & UPDA")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        plot.title = element_text(size=15),
        axis.title = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(10,10,10,5))


p5<-ggplot()+
  geom_rect(data=ca_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1.16,ymax=1.3),col="#E07A5F",fill="#E9B5A4",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_rect(data=vep_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1,ymax=1.14),col="#BFA373",fill="#F2CC8FA4",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=kk_av,linetype="dotted",linewidth=0.85,col="grey30")+
  geom_line(data=ca_vep,aes(Year,disagree),col="#D08F69",lwd=1.25)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1.35),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.5))+
  labs(x="Year",
       y=NULL,
       title ="CA & VEP")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        plot.title=element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(10,10,10,5))

p6<-ggplot()+
  geom_rect(data=upda_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1.16,ymax=1.3),col="#81b29a",fill="#BAD1C2",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_rect(data=vep_ranges_plot,aes(xmin=start,xmax=end,ymin=1,ymax=1.14),col="#BFA373",fill="#F2CC8FA4",alpha=0.5,linewidth = 1)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=kk_av,linetype="dotted",linewidth=0.85,col="grey30")+
  geom_line(data=upda_vep,aes(Year,disagree),col="#A0AB87",lwd=1.25)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1.35),breaks=seq(0,1,by=0.5))+
  labs(x="Year",
       y=NULL,
       title ="UPDA & VEP")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        plot.title=element_text(size=15),
        axis.title=element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(10,10,10,5))

png('./FIGURES/Figure_6_CohensKappa.png',height=14000,width=24000,res=1200)
ggarrange(p1,p2,p3,p4,p5,p6, nrow=2,ncol=3,align="hv")
dev.off()
```

### 6.6 Ceramics of Disagreeable Sites

1.  Find the most disagreeable sites
2.  Assess their assemblages

```{r}
pecosclass_disagree <- filter(pecosclass_annual,Site %in% disagree_and_component$Site.Number)
ca_disagree <- filter(ca_annual,Site %in% disagree_and_component$Site.Number)
upda_disagree <- filter(upda_annual,Site %in% disagree_and_component$Site.Number)
vep_disagree <- filter(vep_annual,Site %in% disagree_and_component$Site.Number)

pecosclass_disagree_sum <- pecosclass_disagree%>%
  select(c("Site","Year","Occupation"))%>%
  group_by(Year)%>%
  summarise(total_count=sum(Occupation,na.rm=T))

ca_disagree_sum <- ca_disagree%>%
  select(c("Site","Year","Occupation"))%>%
  group_by(Year)%>%
  summarise(total_count=sum(Occupation,na.rm=T))

upda_disagree_sum <- upda_disagree%>%
  select(c("Site","Year","Occupation"))%>%
  group_by(Year)%>%
  summarise(total_count=sum(Occupation,na.rm=T))

vep_disagree_sum <- vep_disagree%>%
  select(c("Site","Year","Occupation"))%>%
  group_by(Year)%>%
  summarise(total_count=sum(Occupation,na.rm=T))


p1<-ggplot(data=pecosclass_disagree_sum,aes(Year,total_count))+
  annotate("rect",xmin=900,xmax=999,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1050,xmax=1149,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  geom_line(col="#3d405b",lwd=1.5)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,20),breaks=seq(0,20,by=5))+
  labs(title="Site Count of Most Disagreeable Sites (n=17)",
       x=NULL,
       y="Site Count\nPecos Classification")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2),
        plot.title=element_text(size=18))

p2<-ggplot(data=ca_disagree_sum ,aes(Year,total_count))+
  annotate("rect",xmin=700,xmax=799,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=880,xmax=919,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=980,xmax=1019,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1060,xmax=1099,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1180,xmax=1249,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  geom_line(col="#E07A5F",lwd=1.5)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,20),breaks=seq(0,20,by=5))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y="Site Count\n(CA)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2))

p3<-ggplot(data=upda_disagree_sum ,aes(Year,total_count))+
  annotate("rect",xmin=800,xmax=874,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=925,xmax=974,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1050,xmax=1174,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1201,xmax=1250,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  geom_line(col="#81B29A",lwd=1.5)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,20),breaks=seq(0,20,by=5))+
  labs(x=NULL,
       y="Site Count\n(UPDA)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2))

p4<-ggplot(data=vep_disagree_sum ,aes(Year,total_count))+
  annotate("rect",xmin=700,xmax=724,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=800,xmax=839,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=880,xmax=919,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=980,xmax=1019,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1060,xmax=1099,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1140,xmax=1179,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  annotate("rect",xmin=1225,xmax=1259,ymin=0,ymax=20,col=NA,fill="grey75",alpha=0.20)+
  geom_line(col="#BFA373",lwd=1.5)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(675,1300),breaks=seq(700,1300,by=100))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,20),breaks=seq(0,20,by=5))+
  labs(x="Year",
       y="Site Count\n(VEP)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,0,2))

# p5<-ggplot()+
#   geom_col(data=master_ceramics_prop,aes(Type,Prop,col=Ware,fill=Ware))+
#   scale_color_manual(values=c("#c2c5aa","#023047","#52796f","#d4a373"))+
#   scale_fill_manual(values=c("#c2c5aa","#023047","#52796f","#d4a373"))+
#   scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,0.75),breaks=seq(0,0.75,by=0.25))+
#   labs(title= "Proportion of Ceramic Types by Ware for All Sites (n=79)",
#        x=NULL,
#        y="Proportion")+
#   theme_minimal()+
#   theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
#         panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
#         plot.title=element_text(size=18),
#         axis.title.x=element_blank(),
#         axis.title.y=element_text(size=15),
#         axis.text.x=element_blank(),
#         axis.text.y=element_text(size=13),
#         plot.margin = margin(15,5,5,5),
#         legend.title=element_text(size=15),
#         legend.text=element_text(size=13))
```

#### 6.10.1 Divide by method

```{r}
ceramic_disagreements <- all_list%>%
  reduce(left_join,by="Site.Number")

pecosclass_ca_disagree <- subset(ceramic_disagreements,pecosclass_ca >= as.numeric(stats[1,c("q3")]))

pecosclass_upda_disagree <- subset(ceramic_disagreements,pecosclass_upda >= as.numeric(stats[2,c("q3")]))

pecosclass_vep_disagree <- subset(ceramic_disagreements,pecosclass_vep >= as.numeric(stats[3,c("q3")]))

ca_upda_disagree <- subset(ceramic_disagreements,ca_upda >= as.numeric(stats[4,c("q3")]))

ca_vep_disagree <- subset(ceramic_disagreements,ca_vep >= as.numeric(stats[5,c("q3")]))

upda_vep_disagree <- subset(ceramic_disagreements,upda_vep >= as.numeric(stats[6,c("q3")]))



pecos_ca_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,pecosclass_ca_disagree)%>%
  mutate(pecosclass_ca = Prop-master_pottery_plot$Prop)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","pecosclass_ca"))

pecos_upda_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,pecosclass_upda_disagree)%>%
  mutate(pecosclass_upda = Prop-master_pottery_plot$Prop)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","pecosclass_upda"))

pecos_vep_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,pecosclass_vep_disagree)%>%
  mutate(pecosclass_vep = Prop-master_pottery_plot$Prop)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","pecosclass_vep"))

ca_upda_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,ca_upda_disagree)%>%
  mutate(ca_upda = Prop-master_pottery_plot$Prop)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","ca_upda"))

ca_vep_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,ca_vep_disagree)%>%
  mutate(ca_vep = Prop-master_pottery_plot$Prop)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","ca_vep"))

upda_vep_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,upda_vep_disagree)%>%
  mutate(upda_vep = Prop-master_pottery_plot$Prop)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","upda_vep"))


all_list_ceramics <- list(pecos_ca_disagree_ceramics,pecos_upda_disagree_ceramics,pecos_vep_disagree_ceramics,ca_upda_disagree_ceramics,ca_vep_disagree_ceramics,upda_vep_disagree_ceramics)

all_disagreement_ceramics <- all_list_ceramics%>%
  reduce(left_join,by=c("Type","Ware"))%>%
  gather(method,value,-c("Type","Ware"))


all_disagreement_ceramics$method <- factor(all_disagreement_ceramics$method,levels=c("pecosclass_ca","pecosclass_upda","pecosclass_vep","ca_upda","ca_vep","upda_vep"),labels=c("Pecos Class & CA","Pecos Class & UPDA","Pecos Class & VEP","CA & UPDA","CA & VEP","UPDA & VEP"))
```

```{r}
pecos_ca_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,pecosclass_ca_disagree)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","Prop"))%>%
  setNames(c("Type","Ware","pecosclass_ca"))

pecos_upda_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,pecosclass_upda_disagree)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","Prop"))%>%
  setNames(c("Type","Ware","pecosclass_upda"))

pecos_vep_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,pecosclass_vep_disagree)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","Prop"))%>%
  setNames(c("Type","Ware","pecosclass_vep"))

ca_upda_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,ca_upda_disagree)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","Prop"))%>%
  setNames(c("Type","Ware","ca_upda"))

ca_vep_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,ca_vep_disagree)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","Prop"))%>%
  setNames(c("Type","Ware","ca_vep"))

upda_vep_disagree_ceramics <- sort_ceramics(master_pottery,upda_vep_disagree)%>%
  select(c("Type","Ware","Prop"))%>%
  setNames(c("Type","Ware","upda_vep"))


all_list_ceramics <- list(pecos_ca_disagree_ceramics,pecos_upda_disagree_ceramics,pecos_vep_disagree_ceramics,ca_upda_disagree_ceramics,ca_vep_disagree_ceramics,upda_vep_disagree_ceramics)

all_disagreement_ceramics <- all_list_ceramics%>%
  reduce(left_join,by=c("Type","Ware"))%>%
  gather(method,value,-c("Type","Ware"))

all_disagreement_ceramics$method <- factor(all_disagreement_ceramics$method,levels=c("pecosclass_ca","pecosclass_upda","pecosclass_vep","ca_upda","ca_vep","upda_vep"),labels=c("Pecos Class & CA","Pecos Class & UPDA","Pecos Class & VEP","CA & UPDA","CA & VEP","UPDA & VEP"))
```

#### 6.10.2 Figure 7

```{r}
p1<-ggplot()+
  geom_col(data=master_pottery_plot,aes(Type,Prop,col=Ware,fill=Ware))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#c2c5aa","#023047","#52796f","#d4a373"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#c2c5aa","#023047","#52796f","#d4a373"))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,0.75),breaks=seq(0,0.75,by=0.25))+
  labs(title= "Proportion of Ceramic Types by Ware for All Sites (n=79)",
       x=NULL,
       y="Proportion")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        plot.title=element_text(size=18),
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=15),
        axis.text=element_text(size=13),
        plot.margin = margin(15,5,5,5),
        legend.title=element_text(size=15),
        legend.text=element_text(size=13))

p2<-ggplot()+
  geom_col(data=all_disagreement_ceramics,aes(Type,value,col=Ware,fill=Ware))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#c2c5aa","#023047","#52796f","#d4a373"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#c2c5aa","#023047","#52796f","#d4a373"))+
  labs(title = "Differences among Outliers of Pairwise Comparisons",
       x=NULL,
       y="Difference in Proportion by Ware")+
  facet_wrap(~method)+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey75"),
        strip.text=element_text(size=15),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=13),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust = 1,size=10),
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=15),
        plot.title=element_text(size=18),
        plot.margin = margin(15,0,0,2),
        panel.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"))

png('./FIGURES/Figure_7.png',height=14000,width=28000,res=1200)
ggarrange(p1,p2,nrow=2,ncol=1,common.legend=TRUE,legend="bottom",heights=c(1,2))
dev.off()
```

### 6.11 All Ceramics

```{r}
pecos_ceramics <- summarize_ceramics(pecosclass_binto50)
ca_ceramics <- summarize_ceramics(ca_binto50)
upda_ceramics <- summarize_ceramics(upda_binto50)
vep_ceramics <- summarize_ceramics(vep_binto50)

write.csv(pecos_ceramics,"./OUTPUT/pecos_ceramics.csv")
write.csv(ca_ceramics,"./OUTPUT/ca_ceramics.csv")
write.csv(upda_ceramics,"./OUTPUT/upda_ceramics.csv")
write.csv(vep_ceramics,"./OUTPUT/vep_ceramics.csv")
```

### 6.12 Ceramics of Most Disagreeable Sites

```{r}
pc_vep_disagreesites <- unique(pecosclass_vep_disagree$Site.Number)
ca_vep_disagreesites <- unique(ca_vep_disagree$Site.Number)
upda_vep_disagreesites <- unique(upda_vep_disagree$Site.Number)

total <- c(pc_vep_disagreesites,ca_vep_disagreesites,upda_vep_disagreesites)

disagreeable_sites <- as.data.frame(table(unlist(total)))

disagree_components <- filter(component_details,Site.Number %in% disagreeable_sites$Var1)%>%
  filter(distinct_components_vep>1)

vep_binto50_disagree <- filter(vep_binto50,Site %in% disagree_components$Site.Number)

vep_disagreeable_ceramics_binto50 <- summarize_ceramics(vep_binto50_disagree)

vep_disagreeable_occupation <- filter(vep,Site.Number %in% disagree_components$Site.Number)%>%
  mutate(across(-Site.Number, ~ if_else(. > 0, 1, 0)))

write.csv(vep_disagreeable_occupation,"./OUTPUT/VEP_disagreeablesites_occupation.csv")

write.csv(vep_disagreeable_ceramics_binto50,"./OUTPUT/VEP_disagreeablesites_ceramics.csv")
```
